name: construction contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed approvals cause cash flow gaps. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders via email.
problem_solved: Delayed invoice approvals leading to cash flow gaps.
